title: Superstition
why_this_song: Superstition by Stevie Wonder (1972) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Very superstitious"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "The good things in your past"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "That you don't understand"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "When you believe in things"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "That you don't understand"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "superstitious" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "superstitious" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "things" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "things" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Stevie Wonder one question about "Superstition", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Stevie Wonder sobre "Superstition", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Superstition" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Superstition" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Superstition" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Superstition" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?
